rows.label: tev036401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_SEL0011
rows.name: Ask Chanty about her work.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Chanty about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_SEL0031
rows.name: Ask Chanty what she did during the attack.

rows.label: tev036401_SEL0041
rows.name: Ask Chanty about the Ma-non diet.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0001
rows.name:
I've started a new job since coming
to NLA, you see? Now I work
exclusively as Miss Lucia's chef![ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0002
rows.name:
Every day I think up wonderful dishes
to to serve at her parties, you know?
And as for today's menu...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0003
rows.name:
Ta-da! Gourmet pizza, right? See these here?
They're lightly grilled grex tongues—I cooked
out just enough of the slobber, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0004
rows.name:
Personally, I think it's amazing, but Miss Lucia doesn't
quite seem...sold on it? I suppose food is one of the
harder cultural barriers to overcome, isn't it?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0008
rows.name:
Miss Lucia reminds me so much
of Nokocche, don't you think?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0009
rows.name:
They both love learning about new
cultures and new technologies, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0010
rows.name:
Nokocche and I used to be completely
inseparable before the Growth came after
us, you know? Ah, those were the the days...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0011
rows.name:
Now she's too too head over heels
for the Growth's advanced tech to
spend time with me, I guess?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0012
rows.name:
Oh, but as long as she's doing well, I suppose that's
all that matters, right? Anyway, I guess she's just
hanging out over in the industrial district these days.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0017
rows.name:
I grabbed Miss Lucia and her
neighbor and we took refuge
on on our ship, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0018
rows.name:
They seemed frightened, so I
kept talking to them in order
to to to calm them down.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0019
rows.name:
I think the attack brought
back some bad memories for
Miss Lucia's neighbor, though?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0020
rows.name:
It was rotten luck that the
first xenoforms she met were
those nasty Growth, huh?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0025
rows.name:
Well, a little while ago, Miss Lucia
invited her neighbor over to eat and I
had to whip up something fast, you see?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0026
rows.name:
So I decided to order from Army Pizza and
have them top it with a pile of slimy rare
grex tongues. Good thinking, right?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0027
rows.name:
But Miss Lucia put the pizza in the oven as
soon as she opened the the box. I guess she
wanted the tongues well done? I don't know...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev036401_MSG0028
rows.name:
I know we all appreciate flavor in our own
ways, right? But still, what a waste![ST:wait ]
